loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing total current THD and IEEE 519 compliance status; per-order harmonics (H5/H7) and flicker/crest metrics are not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing V-THD and I-THD phase trends — 5th/7th harmonic orders and per-phase max/min/average stats are not measured by this asset.
